title: Twice Denied
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
lore: Grooves worn into the stone, as if others came this way before you — each of them, it seems, alone.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. negation_intro(¬A) then P := ¬A ⊢ False; by negation_elim(A) from x and P. (2) Uses dni. implication_intro then P := A ⊢ ¬(¬A); by dni(A, P);. (3) Uses dni and dni_imp. and_intro cases; by dni(A, x); and by dni_imp(A);.
